summary: The architecture plan fully aligns with the frozen requirements and provides a detailed, feasible, and secure design for a low-risk static portfolio site. All prior open questions have been resolved, and the plan is implementation-ready. The score is high due to completeness and clarity, with only minor operational and verification refinements remaining.
strengths: Full alignment with confirmed requirements and scope.
Clear, modular static architecture using HTML/CSS hosted on Vercel.
Explicit accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA) and performance (Lighthouse ≥90) targets.
Well-defined CI/CD, rollback, and incident response processes.
Strong security posture with least-privilege access and no data retention.
concerns: Accessibility verification process is described but not fully operationalized (e.g., who performs audits, acceptance criteria).
Observability relies heavily on Vercel defaults; limited external alerting or analytics configuration.
Manual content update workflow may become cumbersome if blog updates increase in frequency.
recommendations: Define explicit accessibility verification workflow (responsible party, tools, acceptance thresholds).
Enhance observability by configuring external uptime alerts or integrating Plausible/Vercel Analytics dashboards.
Document a lightweight content update SOP to ensure consistency and reduce maintenance friction.

issue_updates.title: Undefined content update workflow for blog and contact sections
issue_updates.detail: Fixed. The plan now defines manual Git or Markdown-based updates for blog posts and Formspree or obfuscated mailto for contact. This resolves prior uncertainty and aligns with static architecture constraints.

issue_updates.title: Accessibility and performance targets not formalized
issue_updates.detail: Fixed. The plan explicitly sets WCAG 2.1 AA and Lighthouse ≥90 targets. Minor improvement opportunity remains in defining verification ownership.

issue_updates.title: Limited observability and monitoring configuration
issue_updates.detail: Partially fixed. The plan includes Vercel Analytics and optional Plausible/UptimeRobot, but lacks explicit alerting configuration and monitoring ownership. This slightly limits operability score.

issue_updates.title: Potential exposure of contact email address
issue_updates.detail: Fixed. The plan specifies email obfuscation or Formspree integration, mitigating spam risk.

raw.thinking_summary: This is the first audit round. The architecture plan for the personal portfolio static website is comprehensive, consistent, and well aligned with the confirmed requirements. It resolves all previously identified open questions (content update workflow, contact handling, accessibility, and performance targets). The plan demonstrates strong internal consistency, clear security controls, and implementation-grade detail. Minor areas for improvement remain around operational observability depth and explicit accessibility verification procedures.
